cubiertas.desc: We remove moss, dirt, leaves and debris that affect the look and can speed up roof deterioration.

garajes.title: Garages & driveways

muros.desc: Professional cleaning of enclosures, walls and outdoor elements for an even, renewed finish.

compromiso.intro: We treat every property as if it were our own. Our goal isn't just to clean, but to bring out the best version of every surface — adding aesthetic value, protection and an impeccable look to your home or business.
points: Visible results from the first clean

tecnologia.footnote: Our equipment removes even the toughest stains caused by years of built-up dirt, damp, mould, dust, grease and environmental pollution.

solar.caption: Solar panels
solar.intro: Dust, pollen, limescale and bird droppings reduce your solar panels' output. Professional, safe cleaning restores their efficiency and protects your investment.
points: Recover up to 20% of output lost to dirt
Deionised water: no limescale, marks or residue
Safe methods that won't scratch or damage the panels
We work on roofs, ground mounts and tilted structures
Periodic cleaning recommended 1–2 times a year

items.q: How often should solar panels be cleaned?
items.a: We recommend a professional clean 1–2 times a year. The frequency depends on the area, the panel tilt and how close they are to trees, building works or dirt roads that speed up dirt build-up.

items.q: How much does solar panel cleaning cost?
items.a: From 10 € per panel, with a 120 € minimum service. You can get an instant estimate with our calculator, and we confirm the final price with a free, no-obligation assessment.

items.q: Can cleaning damage or scratch the panels?
items.a: No. We use deionised water and soft brushes made for solar panels, with no abrasive products. It's a safe method that respects the surface and coating of the panels.
We serve Madrid and the surrounding area: Las Rozas, Pozuelo de Alarcón, Majadahonda, Boadilla del Monte and the rest of the Region of Madrid.

items.q: Is there any cost for the quote?
items.a: No. The quote is completely free and with no obligation. We also work Saturdays and Sundays to fit your availability.

footer.tagline: Results you can see. Quality that lasts.
